name: HRA_EVAL_ITEMS
description: This tables stores evaluation item details

columns.Name: EVAL_ITEM_ID
columns.Comments: Primary key for section items

columns.Name: BUSINESS_GROUP_ID
columns.Comments: Foreign key to HR_ALL_ORGANIZATION_UNITS

columns.Name: EVALUATION_ID
columns.Comments: Primary key of Evaluation.

columns.Name: EVAL_SECTION_ID
columns.Comments: The identifier for the section (not shown in the UI)

columns.Name: REFERENCE_ITEM_ID
columns.Comments: Indicates the reference to the current item in Profile Management or Goal Management, depending on the type of the section item.

columns.Name: PARENT_ITEM_ID
columns.Comments: This field indicates the parent item.

columns.Name: ITEM_NAME
columns.Comments: Translated name for item.

columns.Name: DESCRIPTION
columns.Comments: Description of the item.

columns.Name: MEASUREMENT
columns.Comments: Usually used for objectives, this field indicates how achievement of an objective will be measured

columns.Name: TARGET_PROF_REV_RATING_ID
columns.Comments: This is the target performance rating for the item.

columns.Name: TARGET_PERF_REV_RATING_ID
columns.Comments: This is the target proficiency rating for the item.

columns.Name: PERF_RATING_MODEL_ID
columns.Comments: This is the rating model for performance for the item.

columns.Name: PROF_RATING_MODEL_ID
columns.Comments: This is the rating model for proficiency for each item

columns.Name: TARGET_DATE
columns.Comments: This is the target date of the item.  Typically applied to objectives

columns.Name: START_DATE
columns.Comments: This the start date of the item.  Typically applied to objectives

columns.Name: ACHIEVEMENT_DATE
columns.Comments: This is the achievement date of the item.  Typically applied to objectives

columns.Name: DUE_DATE
columns.Comments: This is the due date for the item.

columns.Name: REMINDER_DATE
columns.Comments: This is the reminder date for the item.

columns.Name: MIN_WEIGHT
columns.Comments: This is the minimum weight of the item.

columns.Name: WEIGHT
columns.Comments: This is the weight of the item.

columns.Name: OWNED_BY
columns.Comments: This field indicates the ownership and responsibility for a particular item.

columns.Name: RATING_OVERIDE_FLAG
columns.Comments: Indicates wheter to overide the ratings

columns.Name: MANDATORY_FLAG
columns.Comments: This flag indicates if an item is mandatory.  Such items cannot be deleted or modified by the user

columns.Name: CRITICAL_FLAG
columns.Comments: This flag indicates if an item is critical.  This flag is maintained by the user

columns.Name: PERCENT_COMPLETED
columns.Comments: Percentage of item completed

columns.Name: ADDED_IN_TASK
columns.Comments: Indicates the Item is added during which task

columns.Name: NOT_RATED_FLAG
columns.Comments: Indicates the item is not rated.

columns.Name: NOT_RATED_FLAG_UPDATED_BY
columns.Comments: Indicates the person Id who updated the not rated flag.

columns.Name: OBJECT_VERSION_NUMBER
columns.Comments: Used to implement optimistic locking. This number is incremented every time that the row is updated. The number is compared at the start and end of a transaction to detect whether another session has updated the row since it was queried.

columns.Name: CREATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who created the row.

columns.Name: CREATION_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the creation of the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who last updated the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the last update of the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the session login associated to the user who last updated the row.
